leadText: The Roto-Stick (Japanese: ロトりぼう Rotoribō) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Roto-Stick increases the selfie options when taking photos with the Rotom Phone .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A stick to rest a Rotom Phone on. It allows you to take selfies from a little bit farther away than you could on your own.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Roto-Stick increases the selfie options when taking photos with the Rotom Phone . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A stick to rest a Rotom Phone on. It allows you to take selfies from a little bit farther away than you could on your own. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method S V TM Mossui Town (from the caretaker before orienteering begins)

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Roto-Stick's Japanese name is a portmanteau of ロトム Rotom and 自撮り棒 jidoribō ( selfie stick ).
